finding: Another agent's staged files (source and task-plan) make `taskflow close` fail `ATM_TASKFLOW_CLOSE_INDEX_NOT_ISOLATED`; unattributable staged source cannot be deferred by `--defer-foreign-staged`, so the operator must manually park/restore the foreign staged set.
expectedBehavior: The close window should snapshot-park unattributable foreign staged entries with an explicit restore contract (or wait on a shared index lease) instead of failing isolation.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-AAO-FABLE-002 close required manually unstaging codex-backlog-captain's stalled staged files and restaging them after the closure commit.
followUp: Resolved by ATM-GOV-0233: taskflow close index isolation now has an immutable park/restore receipt contract (`atm.taskflowCloseIndexIsolationReceipt.v1`) so unattributable foreign staged entries are represented explicitly instead of silently dropped or manually improvised.
